headline: Anthropic's $65B funding round reshapes AI startup valuation hierarchy
body: Anthropic closed a $65 billion Series H funding round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, surpassing OpenAI as the most valuable AI startup. The company's Claude models rank among the most secure large language models available, which carries direct implications for healthcare deployments where model safety and security are regulatory requirements. Anthropic's expanded hiring in Europe, including a new Milan office, signals aggressive international scaling that will influence how healthcare organizations access cutting-edge AI infrastructure. For healthcare systems evaluating foundational models for clinical NLP and EHR integration, Anthropic's valuation trajectory and security posture establish a credible alternative vendor landscape alongside established players. The funding scale enables longer development timelines for alignment and safety work, critical differentiators in regulated healthcare settings.
